task:
Open /home/user/Documents/landscape_base.png in GIMP — an 800x600 image with sky blue on the top half and green ground on the bottom half.

Place /home/user/Documents/logo_overlay.png (100x100 solid red) on top of the base image so its top-left corner sits at offset (20, 20) on the base canvas. Flatten into a single layer and export the result as PNG to /home/user/Documents/composite_final.png. The final image must remain 800x600 pixels, with the red logo region visible at (20,20)–(120,120) and the surrounding sky and ground areas untouched.

verification.description: Pixel (70,70) inside pasted logo region is red
Pixel (500,100) in untouched sky area is sky blue
Pixel (500,500) in untouched ground area is green
